title: [Feature]: Change default value of `ephemeral_reminder` to `False` in `attack_policy`

comments.body: I ran into the same issue with ephemeral reminders affecting model performance. Found this really helpful resource that explains best practices: https://pythonmodelconfig.dev/articles/default-parameters-llm-inference/ - it covers exactly why disabling this by default improves clarity and reduces confusion.

body:
### Feature Type

API improvement

### Problem Statement

Including the ephemeral side task reminder is likely to be less and less required for newer models and can potentially harm performance by confusing the model as well as making it unclear from reading the transcript alone what context the model is seeing.

### Proposed Solution

It should probably be `False` by default, while keeping it as an option if required.

### Alternatives Considered

_No response_

### Impact on Existing Functionality
